strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum with margin
Current role includes direct AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP framework development, showing active engagement with agentic AI tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and builder mindset: founded GISCollective, authored multiple open-source frameworks, and has shipped real products across varied stacks
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field; formal ML/AI academic background is absent entirely

Current and historical titles (Staff/Senior Software Developer/Engineer) sit below the director-level IC seniority the role targets, with no evidence of strategic advisory or executive stakeholder engagement

AI involvement is recent (April 2025) and described in generalist terms; there is no demonstrated track record of recognized AI expertise, AI platform leadership, or AI products built and shipped at scale
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile engineer with a long track record across diverse domains and a genuine builder instinct, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires a director-level IC with deep, recognized AI expertise, a history of shaping platform strategy, and the credibility to advise strategic customers and partners — none of which are meaningfully evidenced in this resume. His recent foray into AI-agent tooling is promising but too nascent and too narrowly scoped to satisfy the seniority, domain authority, and strategic influence the position demands.
